---
title: "Grace Lush"
image: images/Remote-sensing.jpg.webp
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 20em
  links: 
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ramon-melser-666932129/
    - icon: twitter
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/ramonmelser
    - icon: envelope-at
      text: Email
      href: mailto:lushg123@student.ubc.ca
---

## Explore My Portfolio

::: {.grid layout-ncol=4}

[![](images/about.jpg)](aboutme.qmd)  
**About Me**

[![](images/resume.jpg)](resume.qmd)  
**Resume**

[![](images/course.jpg)](publications.qmd)  
**Course Deliverables**

[![](images/content.jpg)](content.qmd)  
**Content & Deliverables**

:::
